channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: Global democracy is in better shape than you think
item.description: "Despite what you may have heard, global democracy is more resilient than you think. Dive into the latest data and trends to see how democracy is faring around the world. Check out The Economist's Democracy Index 2025 for a deeper look: https://www.economist.com/interactive/democracy-index-2025"
